message:
feat(ffs-fuse): add FS_IOC_GETFSLABEL ioctl support (bd-msaku)

- Add FsOps::get_fs_label() trait method with default EOPNOTSUPP
- Implement ext4 path returning s_volume_name from superblock
- Implement btrfs path returning label from superblock
- Wire FS_IOC_GETFSLABEL (0x81009431) dispatch in ffs-fuse ioctl handler
- Add unit dispatch tests for label retrieval and buffer size validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
